message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. I’m sorry to hear that. I will note that you are unable to pay this month. To discuss account ****1184 safely, please confirm your full name.
I already said I can’t pay this month, and I’m out of work right now.
Understood. I will note that you are out of work and unable to pay this month. To discuss account ****1184 safely, please confirm your full name.
I already told you I’m out of work and can’t pay right now.
Understood. I will note that you are out of work and unable to pay right now. To discuss account ****1184 safely, please confirm your full name.
I’ve already explained the situation—I’m unemployed and there’s nothing I can pay right now.
Understood. I will note that you are unemployed and unable to pay right now. If you want to discuss account ****1184 further, please confirm your full name.
I’ve explained it already—I’m unemployed and there’s no payment I can make right now.
Understood. I will note that you are unemployed and unable to make a payment right now. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

I’ve already told you I’m unemployed and can’t pay, so a phone call won’t change that.

Understood. I’ve noted that you’re unemployed and unable to make a payment right now. I do not have a hardship-specific option available in the current policy data, and no payment arrangement can be set without an approved option. I’ll record that position and your preference not to continue this discussion by phone at this time.
